title: trichilia trifolia subsp. trifolia
intro: Trichilia trifolia subsp. trifolia, also known as the African bitter tree or bitter calabash, is a plant species within the family Meliaceae, native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and aiding in digestion, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. Trichilia trifolia subsp. trifolia is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used as a topical application for skin issues.
